name: Mirvac Group
analysis: MGR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.7650, stop A$1.5939, target A$2.0200 (1.49:1) — then trail it.
